name: video-content-analyzer
description: Analyze video content, extract keyframes, search web for references, generate Feishu Wiki reports — now with batch directory processing and category-based publishing
author: ClawHub Team

skills.name: process_video
skills.description: Process a single video file and generate analysis report in Feishu Wiki

video_path.description: Path to the input video file

user_id.description: UUID of the user running the analysis

space_id.description: Feishu Wiki space ID where the report should be published

skills.name: batch_process
skills.description: Batch process all videos in a directory, store results in Supabase, and publish categorized analysis reports to Feishu Wiki

directory.description: Path to directory containing video files

user_id.description: UUID of the user running the analysis

space_id.description: Feishu Wiki space ID where reports should be published

categories.description: Mapping of category names to keyword lists for auto-classification, e.g. {"demo": ["demo", "presentation"], "tutorial": ["tut", "howto"]}
